expectations.text: Uses force create element_like spring_damper (not single_component_force or bushing)
expectations.evidence: Used 'force create element translational_spring_damper' — the correct command in Adams CMD is 'force create element_like spring_damper', not 'force create element translational_spring_damper'
Used 'free_length = 250.0' instead of the correct parameter name 'length = 250.0'

expectations.text: Explains that spring_damper is for 1-DOF along a line of action
expectations.evidence: Response mentions the spring 'acts along the line connecting these markers' but does not explicitly explain the 1-DOF constraint or when to choose spring_damper vs bushing
